---
listing:
  id: research-logs
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: false
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  fields: [date, title, reading-time, description, image]
toc: false
---

::: {.hero-section}
# Zhoutong's Research Log

Deep dives into LLM architecture, post-training, and the bridge between research and production.
:::

:::{#research-logs}
:::
